page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.48xlarge is a compute-optimized instance belonging to the ecs.c8a server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing a total of 192 vCPUs without hyperthreading overhead.

The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, which establishes a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, and virtualization is managed via a KVM hypervisor.

With its high physical core count and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for compute-intensive workloads that require massive parallel processing capabilities. It is suited for applications such as high-performance computing, large-scale software compilation, batch processing, and distributed simulation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.48xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it delivers 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 192 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it is designed for highly parallelized, CPU-bound workloads. The high physical core count makes it suitable for intensive batch processing, scientific modeling, and distributed compilation tasks where compute density is prioritized over memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.48xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 384 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized platform featuring dedicated physical cores and high-speed networking for parallelized, CPU-bound enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with single-thread execution
384.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Zero local storage configuration requiring external block storage
Optimized for parallel computing, batch processing, and compilation workloads
